generalComment.text:
The current quality of submissions is unacceptable. Incorrect callsigns, missing/incorrect capitalization, poor transcripts and incorrect speaker role assignments throughout the vast majority of rows
reviewed. Clearly, study of the guidelines is required and you MUST verify information before submitting.
